examples: To worship someone or something is to venerate him, her, or it—not necessarily as you would revere a deity, but at least with extreme devotion or admiration.
Revere him, all you descendants of Israel!
Paul Revere, in fact, was a flatware craftsman.
Even younger residents drop off-the-cuff references to figures like Paul Revere in their casual bar-room banter.
Perhaps what antisnobs really need is a taste of the wines that the snobs revere.
